editorial_shortage_notes: Ethiopia: all five usable candidates came from a single official outlet, the Ethiopian News Agency (ENA). The Reporter Ethiopia's feed failed with malformed XML/RSS, and Addis Fortune returned zero current usable articles despite a healthy doctor check earlier — no independent Ethiopian source confirmed any story today. Two additional ENA items framed as opinion/propaganda attacking Egypt over the Nile dispute were excluded as commentary rather than news. Sudan: all five candidates came from a single independent outlet, Dabanga; Ayin Network returned zero usable current articles in this collection window. Djibouti: one configured source failed with "no URLs configured," and another returned zero usable current articles; coverage still met quota from Radio Télévision de Djibouti, Agence Djiboutienne d'Information and La Nation.
